title: Fix invisible input fields and form elements

requirements.summary: Fix all input fields, textareas, and select elements across all form section components so they are always visually distinct and legible regardless of hover or focus state
acceptanceCriteria: All input fields, textareas, and selects display a visible border at rest (no hover required)
All input fields, textareas, and selects have a non-transparent background color that contrasts with the surrounding page background
Text entered in any field is readable without hovering
Placeholder text is visible at rest
Hover and focus states may add additional styling (e.g., highlight ring) but the field must remain visible when neither hovered nor focused
The fix applies consistently across all form sections and both light and dark theme color tokens defined in index.css

file_operations.description: Update all Input and Textarea components to include visible border and non-transparent background colors at rest. Apply border classes (e.g., border border-border) and background classes (e.g., bg-card or bg-background) to ensure visibility without hover. Ensure text color contrasts properly using text-foreground or similar tokens. Remove or adjust any hover-only visibility logic.
